caption: A first-person perspective camera moves through a residential interior, starting in a hallway. The view initially looks through a doorway into a bedroom where a bed with a floral red and white comforter and a white piece of furniture are visible. As the camera pans right, it briefly captures a black wrought-iron railing on a staircase before turning back toward the bedroom. The camera then enters the room, revealing two single beds, both covered in floral red and white linens. The room has light-colored walls, beige tiled flooring, and two windows with sheer white curtains. A small floral decoration is affixed to the wall between the beds. A white piece of furniture, possibly a desk or dresser, stands in the foreground of the final frames. No people are present in the scene.
